project_parts.primary_tech: Rust 2024 (Axum 0.8, Tokio, rusqlite, reqwest, keyring, tray-icon, windows-sys/WPD, libmtp, MediaProvider adapters)

completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation requirements and treated the prior May 7 completed scan as stale.
Classified as Cargo workspace monorepo with 2 parts: Rust daemon backend and Tauri desktop UI.
Existing docs in docs/ were found; full rescan/update selected from user request.
Tech stack refreshed: Rust daemon with MediaProvider adapters for Jellyfin/Subsonic/OpenSubsonic and Tauri/TypeScript UI with provider-neutral browse.
Exhaustive refresh focused on provider layer, RPC surface, browse UI, sync change detection, manifest metadata, MTP cache fields, and documentation filename drift.
Source-tree analysis updated with domain/ and providers/ modules plus provider-neutral UI responsibilities.
Development guide updated for RTK-prefixed commands, provider tests, and provider development notes.
Integration architecture updated for provider-aware media-server communication, browse flow, and Subsonic/OpenSubsonic API paths.
Architecture docs updated for daemon provider layer, AppState provider state, provider capabilities, database server_config, and UI browse wrappers.
Supporting docs updated: API contracts, data models, component inventory, project overview, and project-parts metadata.
Master index updated and stale legacy doc filenames renamed to hifimule filenames.
Validation checks run for markdown links, stale filename references, generated dates, and git diff status.

findings.project_classification: Monorepo (Cargo workspace), 2 parts: Rust backend + Tauri 2 desktop
findings.api_summary: JSON-RPC on localhost:19140 with provider-neutral server.connect/server.probe, browse.*, sync_detect_changes, device, manifest, sync, scrobble, and transcoding methods
findings.data_summary: DeviceManifest (.hifimule.json on device) + SQLite (devices, scrobble_history, server_config) + OS keyring provider secrets + localStorage basket session
findings.ui_summary: Provider-neutral browse modes in library.ts, server probe badges in login.ts, BasketSidebar sync/device workflow, MediaCard, StatusBar, InitDeviceModal, RepairModal
